name: Tiizz
news:
|DDNet Tournament #64|

It’s time for the first tournament of the year! We will play the brand-new
Brutal (★★★★✰) map DEATHBOW by Exotix!

The Tournament will be played on Sunday, March 15 at 18:00 CET on special
Tournament servers in every DDNet location! No one has seen the map yet and the
first finish will win! Team 0 will be allowed.

Thanks to catseyenebulous and Knuski for testing the map! The results will
later be available at ddnet.org/tournaments
